---
title: "Henrietta Robertson"
---

## Henrietta Robertson

**Dates:** (d.1864)

### Description

missionary in Africa

### Biography

She was first married to a Mr Woodrow, and then to the Rev. R. I Robertson, who worked with Charles Frederick Mackenzie in central Africa.

Henrietta Robertson was the subject of  Anne Mackenzie\'s book [[otherbook:417]<i>Mission Life among the Zulu-Kafirs: Memorials of Henrietta Robertson wife of the Rev. R. Robertson compiled chiefly from letters and journals written to the late Bishop Mackenzie and his sisters</i>] (Cambridge: Deighton 1866) and she also figures in CMY’s [[cmybook:90]<i>Pioneers and Founders, or, Recent Workers in the Mission Field</i>]  (London: Macmillan 1871).

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 6th [1894]
- Letter from January 29, 1867.
- Letter from [August 1865]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
